archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with Coastal Premium
reasoning: The application serves high-end Airbnb and holiday home owners on the Hibiscus Coast. The light theme with warm beige and cream provides trust and cleanliness, while the deep teal and gold accents deliver a premium, 'Taksi-app-like' modern technological feel.

rules: No generic fonts like Inter or Roboto for headings.
Always use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for large headings.
Overlines and labels must be uppercase with wide spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
Use 'Bento' Grid Protocol for the Admin/Team dashboards to maximize screen real estate.
Marketing pages must feature asymmetrical layouts.
Containers with borders must have generous internal padding (p-6 or p-8).

surface_strategies.headers: Glassmorphism with optical clarity: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70 border-b border-white/40 shadow-sm.
surface_strategies.cards_marketing: Neumorphism mix: soft shadow with a crisp 1px border (border-black/5) to ground it.
surface_strategies.cards_dashboard: Flat background with 1px subtle border (border-border), rounded-xl. On hover: -translate-y-1 shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.radius: rounded-2xl for main containers, rounded-full for buttons (matching modern app aesthetics like Taksi).

components.buttons: rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium transition-all duration-200. Primary buttons use Teal (#0D7377), Secondary use Beige.
components.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: rounded-xl border-border/50 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary.
components.cards: Avoid Shadcn Card default if it looks too rigid. Build custom bento divs for dashboards with rounded-2xl.
components.icons: Use @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight). Install via: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react

animations.page_transitions: Fade in with slight upward translation (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1).
animations.hover_states: Buttons and cards must elevate slightly and adjust shadow.
animations.scrolling: Use lenis for smooth momentum scrolling on marketing sections.

hero_image.description: Brand hero image for the landing page face.
hero_image.overlay_strategy: Gradient overlay bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 via-black/30 to-transparent to ensure text readability while maintaining image visibility.

media.rules: All images MUST be used. Do not use any placeholder images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required dependencies: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react framer-motion clsx tailwind-merge
CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='navigate-app-button').
Build a 'Navigate to App' button directly on the hero section.
Implement the three dashboards (Client, Team, Admin) using the 'Bento' Grid Protocol.
Do not use generic fully centered layouts; prioritize asymmetrical tension in the marketing sections.
Ensure contrast ratios meet APCA/WCAG standards, especially with the teal and white combinations.
